About the role

CyberNet' is seeking an experienced Quality Assurance (QA) - Automated professional to join our team on a contract basis. This role is critical in ensuring the high-quality delivery of our innovative technology solutions to clients across Thailand. As a QA - Automated specialist, you will be responsible for developing and executing comprehensive test plans to identify and resolve software defects, with a focus on automated testing processes. This is an excellent opportunity to contribute your expertise to a dynamic, growing organisation and further develop your skills in the field of software quality assurance.

What you'll be doing

Design, develop and maintain comprehensive test plans and automation scripts to thoroughly evaluate the functionality, usability and performance of our software applications

Collaborate closely with development teams to analyse requirements, identify risks and define appropriate test strategies

Automate repetitive test cases to improve testing efficiency and coverage

Continuously monitor and report on the quality of software releases, identifying and prioritising defects for timely resolution

Stay up-to-date with the latest testing tools, frameworks and methodologies to drive continuous improvement in our quality assurance processes

What we're looking for

- 2+ years Experience in website testing(Backend + Frontend)
- Working experience on agile methodologies
- Experience in define product quality strategy and test plan
- Experience testing in web applications / web services
- Good interpersonal skills and work as a team player
- Experience in Cypress, Playwright (For automated positions)

Full_Description:
Key Responsibilities:

Services Consultant Execution: Develop and execute the presales activity for professional services, emphasizing the value and ROI of service consultant initiatives. Align the presales strategy with the overall service consultant strategy and company revenue goals. Define target markets, ideal client profiles, and value propositions that clearly articulate the benefits of service consultant.

Solution Architecture & Scoping: Requirements Gathering: Lead discovery workshops with customers to understand business pain points and technical requirements. Gap Analysis: Identify where "out-of-the-box" software meets needs and where custom services or integrations are required. Services design: Create high-level services design scope and implementation roadmaps.

Presales Support & Engagement: Provide technical expertise and support to the sales team throughout the sales cycle, focusing on the services aspect and, critically, the value of service Consultant. Participate in client meetings, understand their business challenges, and develop tailored service solutions that incorporate and highlight service consultant principles. RFP/RFI Ownership: Provide technical responses for the "services and implementation" sections of formal bids.

Implementation Cost Proposal Creation: Lead the development of compelling service cost proposals that clearly articulate the value proposition of service consultant. Ensure proposals are technically sound, commercially viable, and address client needs effectively, while showcasing how service consultant will contribute to project success. Calculate the number of hours or days required for consultants, developers, and project managers to complete the work. Determine the specific skill sets needed. Ensure the service margins align with company target and goals.

Service Portfolio Management (Service Consultant Focus): Understand and articulate the company's service portfolio, emphasizing how each offering incorporates and benefits from service consultant principles. Identify opportunities to expand and enhance the service portfolio based on market demand and client feedback, specifically related to service Consultant offerings.

Collaboration with Service Sales & Delivery Teams: Work closely with service sales and delivery teams to ensure smooth handoff of projects from sales/presale to services sales and delivery. Ensure the effectively communicate these to clients.

Pricing & Commercial Negotiation (Service Consultant Value): Support costing strategies for service offerings that reflect the added value of service consultant. Participate in commercial negotiations with clients, ensuring profitable contracts that investing in service Consultant.

Market Analysis & Competitive Intelligence (Service Consultant Lens): Stay informed about market trends, competitive landscape, and client needs related to professional services and service consultant. Provide competitive intelligence to the sales and product teams, focusing on how competitors approach (or fail to address) service consultant.

Internal Transition: Brief the Delivery/Implementation team once the deal is signed to ensure they understand the "why" and "how" of what was sold, preventing "scope creep" later on.

Role & Responsibilities;

Improve Sales Win Rate: Increase the sales win rate by providing effective technical support and solutions that address customer needs. This can be tied to specific products, territories, or customer segments.

Increase Average Deal Size: Drive larger deals by showcasing the full value and capabilities of our solutions through compelling demonstrations and technical proposals. Target a specific percentage increase in average deal size.

Reduce Sales Cycle Length: Streamline the sales process by efficiently addressing technical questions and concerns, leading to faster deal closures. Aim to reduce the sales cycle by a specific number of days or weeks.

Enhance Sales Team Effectiveness: Provide training and resources to the sales team on product knowledge, competitive positioning, and effective communication of technical value. Measure this through sales team surveys or performance improvements.

Become a Service Consultant Advocate: You'll be the voice of service consultant, showcasing how our services not only solve technical problems but also create amazing customer experiences and deliver tangible business results. Think of yourself as a service storyteller.

Understand Our Clients (and Their World): Dive deep into understanding our clients' businesses, their challenges, and what really matters to them. Leverage your digital fluency to research their industry, their competitors, and their online presence. Show them you get their world.

Craft Compelling Solutions: Work with the sales team to develop tailored service solutions that address specific client needs. You'll be the technical expert, but also the one who can translate technical jargon into clear, concise, and engaging language that resonates with clients. Think "explain it like I'm five" but for business.

Show, Don't Just Tell: Create and deliver engaging presentations, demos, and proposals that showcase the value of our services. Utilize your creativity and tech-savviness to make these presentations dynamic and interactive. Think beyond slides – explore new formats and platforms.

Be a Tech Translator: Bridge the gap between technical teams and clients. You'll translate complex technical details into easy-to-understand language, ensuring clients understand the value and benefits of our services.

Stay Ahead of the Curve: Keep up-to-date with the latest trends in technology, service Consultant, and customer experience. Share your insights with the team and contribute to the development of new service offerings. Be the go-to expert on what's next.

Collaborate & Connect: Work closely with sales, delivery, and service Consultant teams to ensure seamless collaboration and alignment. You'll be a key player in ensuring we deliver on our promises. Networking and teamwork are key.

Embrace Data & Feedback: Track key metrics related to presales performance and customer satisfaction. Use data to identify areas for improvement and contribute to the optimization of presales processes. Be data-driven in your approach.

Contribute to Our Culture: Bring your unique perspective and ideas to the team. We value innovation and encourage you to challenge the status quo. Help us build a culture of service Consultant

 

Qualifications:

Bachelor's degree in a related field (e.g., Engineering, Computer Science). MBA preferred.

Proven experience in presales functions, with a strong focus on services presales. More than 5 years of relevant experience is preferred.

Strong understanding of professional services, service delivery methodologies, and sales processes. A deep understanding of the value of service consultant and how it impacts business outcomes.

Excellent communication, presentation, and interpersonal skills. Ability to articulate the value of service Consultant in a compelling way.

Ability to build rapport and establish credibility with clients and internal stakeholders.

Strong analytical, problem-solving, and negotiation skills.

Experience with CRM and other sales tools.

Skills:

Presales Strategy & Execution

Solution Selling & Value Proposition Development (Service Consultant Focused)

Proposal Development & Pricing (Highlighting Service Consultant ROI)

Service Portfolio Management (Service Consultant Perspective)

Resource Management & Planning (Service Consultant Considerations)

Collaboration with Delivery & Service Consultant Teams

Negotiation & Influencing Skills (Service Consultant Value Proposition)

Market Analysis & Competitive Intelligence (Service Consultant Lens)

Financial Acumen

การสื่อสารกับลูกค้า

การวิเคราะห์ปัญหา

การจัดการเวลา

การทำงานเป็นทีม

- มีประสบการณ์ ERP เช่น SAP, Microsoft Dynamics, Odoo, ERP ภายในองค์กร (ถ้ามีจะพิจารณาเป็นพิเศษ)

- มีความรู้ด้านบัญชี (ถ้ามีจะพิจารณาเป็นพิเศษ)

- มีประสบการณ์ Data Migration (ถ้ามีจะพิจารณาเป็นพิเศษ)

หน้าที่และความรับผิดชอบ (Job Responsibilities)

·        ดำเนินการวิเคราะห์ช่องว่าง (Gap Analysis) เทียบกับมาตรฐาน ISO/IEC 27001 และข้อกำหนด PDPA เพื่อประเมินสถานะปัจจุบันขององค์กร

·        ออกแบบและพัฒนาโครงสร้างระบบบริหารความมั่นคงปลอดภัยสารสนเทศ (ISMS) ให้สอดคล้องกับบริบทขององค์กร

·        จัดทำและพัฒนาเอกสาร ISMS ที่เกี่ยวข้อง เช่น Policy, Procedure, Standard, Guideline และแบบฟอร์มต่าง ๆ

·        ดำเนินการวิเคราะห์ความเสี่ยงด้านความมั่นคงปลอดภัยสารสนเทศ (Risk Assessment) และจัดทำแผนจัดการความเสี่ยง (Risk Treatment Plan)

·        กำหนดและสนับสนุนการดำเนินการควบคุม (Controls) ตาม Annex A และมาตรฐานที่เกี่ยวข้อง

·        ให้คำปรึกษาและสนับสนุนองค์กรในการดำเนินงานเพื่อให้สอดคล้องกับข้อกำหนด PDPA เช่น Data Mapping, Data Classification, Privacy Notice

·        สนับสนุนการเตรียมความพร้อมสำหรับการตรวจประเมิน (Audit) ทั้ง Internal Audit และ Certification Audit

·        ประสานงานและให้คำแนะนำแก่หน่วยงานที่เกี่ยวข้อง เพื่อให้การดำเนินโครงการเป็นไปตามแผนงาน

·        จัดทำและนำเสนอรายงานความคืบหน้าโครงการ (Project Status Report) ต่อผู้บริหารและลูกค้า

·        วิเคราะห์และติดตามความเสี่ยง ประเด็นปัญหา (Issue) และการเปลี่ยนแปลง (Change) ของโครงการ พร้อมเสนอแนวทางแก้ไข

·        สนับสนุนการจัดอบรม (Training / Awareness) ด้าน Information Security และ PDPA ให้กับพนักงานในองค์กร

·        ให้คำปรึกษาเชิงลึกแก่ลูกค้าในด้าน Governance, Risk และ Compliance (GRC)

·        สนับสนุนการพัฒนาและปรับปรุงกระบวนการด้าน Information Security และ Compliance อย่างต่อเนื่อง

·        ใช้เครื่องมือและเทคโนโลยี รวมถึง AI เพื่อเพิ่มประสิทธิภาพในการดำเนินงานและการจัดทำเอกสาร

·        ปฏิบัติงานอื่น ๆ ตามที่ได้รับมอบหมาย หรือตามขอบเขตงานที่ปรึกษาที่เกี่ยวข้องเพื่อสนับสนุนการดำเนินงานขององค์กร




คุณสมบัติผู้สมัคร

·        จบการศึกษาปริญญาตรีสาขา Computer Engineering, Computer Science, Information Technology, หรือสาขาอื่นๆ ที่เกี่ยวข้องจะพิจารณาเป็นพิเศษ

·        มีประสบการณ์อย่างน้อย 2 ปี ด้าน Information Security หรือ IT Security หรือหากเคยทำโครงการ ISO27001 (ISMS) มาโดยตรงจะพิจารณาเป็นพิเศษ

·        มีความรู้ความเข้าใจ และประสบการณ์มาตรฐาน ISO/IEC 27001 เป็นอย่างน้อย หากมีใบรับรองที่เกี่ยวข้องจะพิจารณาเป็นพิเศษ

·        มีทักษะในการสื่อสารและนำเสนอข้อมูลได้อย่างชัดเจนและเข้าใจง่าย

·        มีทักษะในการวิเคราะห์และแก้ไขปัญหาได้อย่างรวดเร็วและมีประสิทธิภาพ

·        มีความรับผิดชอบ ตรงต่อเวลา มีความซื่อสัตย์ มีความคล่องตัวสูง และรักษาความลับของข้อมูลลูกค้า

·        ใฝ่เรียนรู้และพัฒนาตนเองอยู่เสมอสามารถทำงานเป็นทีมได้ สามารถบริหารเวลาได้

·        สามารถทำ Gap Analysis, Risk Assessment, ISMS Documentation และเตรียม Audit ได้

·        มีความรู้ด้าน IT Security และ Controls (เช่น Annex A / NIST)

·        สามารถทำงานกับลูกค้าและทีมงานได้ดี

·        มีความรับผิดชอบ มี ownership และส่งมอบงานตรงเวลา

·        ให้ความสำคัญกับคุณภาพงานและเอกสาร

Manatal is an HRTech software service (B2B SaaS) company headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand. Manatal is one of the fastest-growing start-ups in the region and is backed by Surge and Sequoia Capital. Manatal has a global presence and is trusted by thousands of businesses in over 130 countries.

Our goal is to transform the entire hiring process by making it simple, efficient and enjoyable for recruiters, hiring managers, and candidates alike.

Our mission is to offer the best-in-class AI-powered technologies to empower small, medium and large businesses in their staffing & recruitment transformation.

Role overview

As a Project Manager (Tech) you will be part of our Tech Team. Your role is to improve existing and establish new processes for scaling the Tech team's capabilities. As part of this role, you will improve and build processes, ensure the delivery of projects, monitor progress against core KPIs, and build reports and presentations for internal teams.

Responsibilities

Implement new processes and improve existing ones to grow the operations of the Tech team

Co-lead the definition and delivery of large projects through the application of Scrum/Agile and other project management tools

Assist with the definition of potential projects to support the future growth of the business

Identify, quantify and compare potential projects, and play an active role in the prioritization

Secure the appropriate business sponsorship for allocated improvement projects.

Deliver training and provide mentoring support in Scrum/Agile and other project management methodologies, Root Cause Analysis and workshop facilitation techniques, while being an exemplar of all of these skills among others

Requirements
General requirements

Fluency in English (written and verbal)

2+ years of Project Management Experience

Track record of delivering major cross-functional projects

Prior experience in Scrum/Agile project management methodologies

Strong experience managing Jira, or equivalent platforms, including configuring workflows and automations.

Strong experience documenting knowledge and processes in Notion, Confluence, or equivalent platforms.

Experience designing, rolling out, and improving organizations' processes

Experience working with Data tools (e.g. SQL) and Data Visualization tools (e.g. Metabase)

Experience with Software products and SaaS

Nice to have

Prior experience operating within high-growth startup cultures.

Experience with tools like Intercom, Hubspot, Fiverr, Figma, Lokalise, etc.

Experience with process automation via e.g. Zapier

Why you'll enjoy working with Manatal

Well-funded start-up backed by Surge & Sequoia

Be part of one of the fastest-growing B2B SaaS start-ups in the region

You will be collaborating with talented individuals in the industry

Join a lively and highly international team

Indulge in a challenging and innovative working culture

Attractive medical healthcare plan

Personal development allowance

2 weeks of work from anywhere per year

Regular fun team-building activities

About the role:

Going Jesse Co., Ltd. is seeking a motivated Data Science & AI to support the development of data-driven solutions, machine learning models, and AI-powered systems. This role involves building data pipelines, developing APIs, deploying AI models, and supporting forecasting and analytics initiatives to drive business insights and innovation

Key Responsibilities:

Data Engineering & Pipeline Development

Design, build, and maintain data pipelines (ETL/ELT processes)

Collect, clean, and preprocess structured and unstructured data

Optimize SQL queries and manage data transformation workflows

Ensure data quality, integrity, and versioning across projects

Machine Learning & AI Development

Develop, train, and evaluate Machine Learning models

Build forecasting models for business and operational use cases

Designed AI solutions and deployed an agentic LLM-based system using RAG and automated web scraping pipelines

Conduct experimentation, validation, and model performance tuning

API & System Development

Develop and maintain RESTful APIs using FastAPI

Integrate ML models into production systems

Collaborate with backend and frontend teams for system integration

Dashboard & Visualization

Build dashboards and data visualization tools to support decision-making

Monitor and analyze model performance and business metrics

Collaboration & Documentation

Work closely with Business Analysts, Developers, and stakeholders

Containerize applications and ML services using Docker

Support deployment workflows and model versioning

Collaborate with DevOps teams for CI/CD integration

Document data workflows, models, and technical solutions

Stay updated with industry trends in AI, ML, and data technologies




Qualifications:

Minimum 2 years of experience in Data Science, Machine Learning, or related roles

Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Data Science, Software Engineering, or a related field

Proficient in Python and SQL, with experience building automated data pipelines and LLM (RAG)-based solutions

Experience building ETL pipelines and working with large datasets

Hands-on experience with FastAPI or similar Python frameworks

Understanding of Machine Learning algorithms and forecasting techniques

Familiarity with RAG architecture or LLM integration is a plus

Experience with Docker and version control systems (e.g., Git)

Strong analytical thinking and problem-solving skills

Candidates with prior experience in Software development is highly encouraged to apply

Infrastructure & Tools

Experience with Docker and container-based development workflows

Familiarity with CI/CD tools such as GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, or Jenkins
